---
title: "unfold_axes"
generated: true
description: "Unfold the specified consecutive axes into a single new axis."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.numerics.tensor_ops`](../nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix._internal.util`.*

*decorated:* `@partial(jax.jit, static_argnames=('axes',))`

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:unfold_axes -->
```python
unfold_axes(tensor: Shaped[Array, ...], axes: Union[int, Tuple[int, ...]]) -> Shaped[Array, ...]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:unfold_axes -->
Unfold the specified consecutive axes into a single new axis.

This function will fail if the specified axes are not consecutive.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:unfold_axes -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `tensor` | `Shaped[Array, ...]` | — | — | — |
| `axes` | `Union[int, Tuple[int, ...]]` | — | — | — |

**Returns** `Shaped[Array, ...]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
